query: SELECT s.id, s.fullName, s.score, COUNT(tv.id) as vote_count, (COUNT(tv.id) * 10) as expected_score FROM students s LEFT JOIN teacher_votes tv ON s.id = tv.studentId WHERE s.fullName LIKE '%أحمد سلطان%' GROUP BY s.id, s.fullName, s.score;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35xPkBa73Yuiy4A.root --database kcQuJzmxhkjxjyE5pHTEwG --execute SELECT s.id, s.fullName, s.score, COUNT(tv.id) as vote_count, (COUNT(tv.id) * 10) as expected_score FROM students s LEFT JOIN teacher_votes tv ON s.id = tv.studentId WHERE s.fullName LIKE '%أحمد سلطان%' GROUP BY s.id, s.fullName, s.score;
